description: Payment authorization stuck in processing state. Stripe client initialization failed because merchant client_id evaluated to null in spring environment config.

description: Invoice MQ queue cluster disc free space limit reached (0 bytes available). Message publishing blocked across all payment invoice topics.

description: Order setup block failed during creation. Order status reflected as APPROVED in UI while Backend DB enum state remains UNINITIALIZED.
